subject: Accounting
title: Earnings Management
description: A fast breakdown of Earnings Management for builders.

hook.text: Earnings management is legal accounting trickery—and the line between smart and shady is razor thin.

buildup.text: Companies use timing of revenue recognition, expense deferrals, and reserves to smooth earnings.

discovery.text: Within GAAP rules, managers can make legitimate choices that shift income between quarters.

twist.text: The same techniques used aggressively become fraud. The difference is intent and magnitude.

climax.text: Accountants must judge whether management's choices follow the spirit of the rules—not just the letter.

punchline.text: Legal and ethical are not always the same thing.

quiz.question: What makes earnings management different from fraud?
options: It uses legitimate accounting choices within the rules
It always involves breaking the law
